title: In 2021, a 4-year-old girl walking on a beach spotted a mark in a rock that turned out to be a dinosaur footprint
summary_full: A remarkable dinosaur footprint, 220 million years old, was found by a young girl in Wales. This trace fossil offers insights into prehistoric life and animal behavior. Scientists are studying the ancient track to understand dinosaur movement. The discovery emphasizes that important finds can be made through simple observation, reminding us of Earth's deep history.
